title: Church & Dwight: Leaving The Black Swan Behind
text: Church & Dwight faced a tough year with margin compression. For the first time in the past 16 years, it had a negative TSR.

title: Walmart, Home Depot Among 15 Companies To Announce Dividend Increases In Second Half Of February
text: When it comes to annual dividend increases, February is the highlight of the year. There were at least 27 dividend boosts that were announced from a wide variety of companies. Widely held companies 3M, PepsiCo, and Coca-Cola all boosted their dividends in the first half of the month, with Pepsi announcing a 10% increase.

title: Church & Dwight to Present at 2023 CAGNY Conference
text: EWING, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) will present at the 2023 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference on Wednesday, February 22, 2023, at 3:00 PM EST. The presentation will be broadcast on the company's website. A replay of the webcast will be available following the event. Church & Dwight Co., Inc., founded in 1846, is the leading U.S. producer of sodium bicarbonate, popularly known as baking soda.

title: The Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Quality Scores
text: The annual rebalancing and subsequent changes to the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index have produced a new list of 67 dividend growth stocks called the Dividend Aristocrats. I rank the Dividend Aristocrats using Quality Snapshots, an elegant and effective system for assessing the quality of dividend growth stocks.

title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of February 5
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends.

title: Church & Dwight Co, Inc. (CHD) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Church & Dwight Co, Inc. (NYSE:CHD ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call February 3, 2023 1:00 PM ET Company Participants Richard Dierker - CFO, EVP & Head of Business Operations Barry Bruno - Head of Marketing Surabhi Pokhriyal - Chief Digital Growth Officer Michael Read - Senior Key Executive Matthew Farrell - President, CEO & Chairman Paul Wood - Chief Commercial Officer Rick Spann - Executive VP Conference Call Participants Kevin Grundy - Jefferies Rupesh Parikh - Oppenheimer Lauren Lieberman - Barclays Olivia Cheang - Raymond James Mark Astrachan - Stifel Jonathan Feeney - Consumer Edge Research, LLC Anna Lizzul - Bank of America Filippo Falorni - Citi Christopher Carey - Wells Fargo Stephen Powers - Deutsche Bank Andrea Teixeira - JPMorgan Peter Grom - UBS Investment Matthew Farrell I'll call everybody to attention. Hey, we haven't been together for a few years.

title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Church & Dwight (CHD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.33% and 2.91%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Church & Dwight Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results
text: EWING, N.J.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) today announced full year net sales increased 3.6% to $5,375.6 million including a 1% drag from currency, exceeding the Company's outlook of 3%. Organic sales increased 1.4% due to positive pricing of 6.5%, partially offset by a volume decline of 5.1%.1
